title: Professional 20 Litre Yellow Kentucky Mop System With Wheels and Double Bucket
features: A lightweight wheeled bucket with removable wringer and divider to separate clean and dirty water.
This bucket is designed to be used for damp mopping with microfibre mops.
Printed with ‘Caution wet floor’ on two sides, and available in five colours.
description: Product Description Professional 20 Litre Kentucky Mop System This fantastic mop system from Ideal 365 is made out of sturdy plastic and features a double bucket, wringer, wheels, handle and a removable easy carry wringer with 'Caution Wet Floor' printed on both large sides of the bucket. This lightweight wheeled bucket with removable wringer and divider easily separates clean and dirty water, offering more efficient and effective cleaning. This mop system is designed to be used for damp mopping with microfibre mops. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. Removable Wringer When the cleaning is done and the dirty water needs to be emptied, the wringer can be removed from the bucket with ease. Wringer Squeeze Function The wringer comes with a 'squeeze' pad that can be pushed against the mop head easily with the push lever. Detachable Wheels The Kentucky Mop System bucket can be used stationary or moved around thanks to its detachable wheels. Bucket Divider The bucket comes with a removable divider to separate clean and dirty water, acting as a double bucket. The video showcases the product in use.
